text:
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"4","subject":"Prioritize skills for improvement","description":"Review both assessment reports (specs/skill-assessment-local.md and specs/skill-assessment-marketplace.md).
Select 3-5 skills to improve, prioritizing:
1. Local skills (user-authored, most impactful)
2. Skills with poor descriptions (triggering failures)
3. Skills with missing examples or unclear instructions
Present prioritized list to user for approval before proceeding.","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-03-05T15:55:29.727Z"}

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"6","subject":"Review and simplify changed code","description":"Get the list of changed files with git diff --name-only.
Review all changed skill files for quality, consistency, and simplicity.
Ensure no regressions or broken references were introduced.
Report PASS or NEEDS_FIXES with specific issues.","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-03-05T15:57:58.557Z"}
